channel.title: Sound Sessions Journal | Retail Music Strategy
channel.description: Research-backed insights on retail music strategy, in-store customer behavior, and AI-powered audio optimization.

item.title: Couples Reconnection
item.description: A date-night sound session in Denver for two people who want an evening side by side. Shared sound, low light, somewhere to start talking after.

item.title: Grief
item.description: A facilitated sound session in Denver for people carrying a death. A smaller room, fewer seats, more time held at the quiet end.

item.title: Laid Off
item.description: A sound session for people leaving a company and the teams they leave behind. Usually booked by the employer as part of a decent goodbye.

item.title: New to Denver
item.description: A sound session for people who just moved to Denver. Seventy-five minutes of engineered sound, then time to meet others who came for the same reason.

item.title: Quiet New Year's
item.description: An alternative to the New Year's party in Denver. One night at the turn of the year for entering it rested and clear.

item.title: Singles
item.description: A social night in Denver with sound at the center, for single people who would rather meet someone in a calm room than a loud one.

item.title: Sleep Descent
item.description: A recorded sound descent for the end of the day, produced with the same care as the live rooms. Arrives free for the email list first.

item.title: Sunday Downshift
item.description: A recurring Sunday evening sound session in Denver for closing the week on purpose. Seventy-five minutes of engineered sound and guided rest.

item.title: Healing from Breakups
item.description: A facilitated sound session in Denver for anyone carrying the end of a relationship. Seventy-five minutes of engineered sound, low light, formal ceremony. First date being set.

item.title: Blog
item.description: Writing on sound, rooms, and what people put down in them. From the producer behind Denver sound sessions.
